caption: The video features a news anchor dressed in a formal gray suit with a red shirt and patterned tie, presenting a segment on "Off-Grid Solar Training." The background is a professional studio setup with a blue and green gradient design. In the top right corner, there is an inset image showing two individuals engaged in what appears to be a training session, possibly discussing or working on solar technology materials. The man in the inset is wearing glasses and a dark jacket, while the woman beside him is focused on some documents or a device. The overall setting suggests an informative piece aimed at educating viewers about off-grid solar energy solutions.
